Plamo Zone

Home Why

Char's Zaku, HG kit, in a cool carrying case that I can clip onto my belt loops or Ita bag.
HG Gundam G-self Perfect Pack in progress.
The Qubeleys, my pride and joy. I love them so much and I would kill for them too.
Ksatriya is part of the beautiful round (usually Zeon) mobile suits that I like and want and love. Huge for an HG.
The-O is funny because it has penis swords, really cool kit with very unique and uniquely painful-to-build pauldrons.
G-Self perfect pack, in attack mode! Really cool that it comes with a stand included cause without it it probably can't stand lol.
Another G-Self pic, this time in reflector mode.
Shelf shot of a ragtag few plamo kits and other plastics.
The Big Shelf, for the Big Boys. Especially Psycho Gundam on top.
My one and only 30 Minutes Missions kit of Spinatia, pretty neat, quite liked the amount of panel lines and how well they took to panel liner.
The Yuri Composition, not mine but my partner's, too cute not to include.
